description: TEMPLATE — decay-time tau_decay vs R, to be digitized from Barkley (2011) Fig. 5a (decay branch). No data file is shipped; provide barkley2011_fig5a_tau_decay.csv yourself.
units: x: dimensionless R; y: advective time units (log axis in the figure)
uncertainty: digitization error (reading a log axis by eye) plus this project's reduced-ensemble error

source.title: Simplifying the complexity of pipe flow
source.obtained_by: TEMPLATE — replace with: 'digitized Fig. 5a decay branch with WebPlotDigitizer, N points'

verification_note: Set verification to primary_verified only after you read the curve off the paper's own Fig. 5a.
